source.body_text_sample:

Artists @ CS
Support Us
Work with Us

Come join Canada’s leading contemporary performing arts organization as we create a collision of disciplines and cultures reflecting the dynamism and complexity of Canada. Be part of a vital artistic force locally, nationally, and internationally.

People - We respect and celebrate the potential in everyone.

Belonging - We create spaces where everyone feels welcome and can connect.

Curiosity - We welcome different perspectives and embrace the endless possibilities of storytelling.

Craft - We are dedicated to excellence in everything we do and support the collaborative, creative process of making live theatre.

At Canadian Stage we seek to hire individuals who share these values. We value the diversity of people and communities we serve and are committed to equity and inclusion in all our operations.

If you require accommodation with the application process, please contact hr@canadianstage.com.
